title: FCoP IPC Envelope
description: Abstraction 3 of 7 — IPC. Per ADR-0015 §abstractions and ADR-0021 §IPC-Surface, this schema covers the four envelope types that share a common frontmatter base: TASK, REPORT, ISSUE, REVIEW. The shared base is intentionally small (protocol/version/sender/type); per-envelope discriminator branches add the type-specific required fields. Root uses `additionalProperties: true` so 0.7.x files with extra unknown frontmatter keys remain valid (per ADR-0003 backward-compat).

roleCode.description: An agent role code. Per agent.schema.json.

priority.description: Priority bucket inherited from 0.7.x convention. P0 = critical, P3 = low. Per existing fcop-spec-v1.0.3.md (preserved verbatim for v1.0).

envelopeBase.description: Shared frontmatter base for all four envelope types (per ADR-0021 §required_frontmatter_base).

protocol.description: Conformance marker. MUST be the literal string 'fcop'.

version.description: FCoP envelope version. v1.0 uses integer 1; will become 2 only on a MAJOR protocol bump per ADR-0003.

date.description: Authoring date. Per 0.7.x convention; not strictly required for v1.0 but MUST validate against isoDate when present.

task.title: TASK envelope
task.description: Per existing 0.7.x spec + ADR-0015. A directive from sender to recipient. Filename: TASK-{date}-{seq}-{from}-to-{to}.md.

status.description: Optional explicit status; absent = 'pending'. Per 0.7.x + ADR-0019 (`aborted` added by ADR-0019 §abort recovery action).

ref_task.description: Optional reference to a parent TASK file path.

report.title: REPORT envelope
report.description: Per existing 0.7.x spec. The recipient's self-reported status reply to a TASK. Filename: REPORT-{date}-{seq}-{from}-to-{to}.md.

ref_task.description: Path to the TASK file this REPORT replies to.

issue.title: ISSUE envelope
issue.description: Per existing 0.7.x spec. A blocker or open question raised by sender, not directed at a single recipient. Filename: ISSUE-{date}-{seq}-{from}.md.

ref_task.description: Optional reference to a TASK that triggered the issue.

review.title: REVIEW envelope (v1.0 minimal surface)
review.description: Per ADR-0017. New envelope type added in v1.0. Filename: REVIEW-{date}-{seq}-{reviewer}-on-{subject_ref_short}.md. v1.0 deliberately does NOT include needs_human / human_approval — those are deferred to v1.2+ per ADR-0015 §non-goals. Detailed REVIEW schema is in review.schema.json; this stub covers the envelope-level requirements only.

subject_ref.description: Reference to the artefact under review (file path for task/report/code_change, fcop.json roles diff for role_switch). Per ADR-0017.

rationale.description: Body-text rationale for the decision. SHOULD be present for non-`abstained` decisions.

required_changes.description: Per ADR-0017. Required only when decision = `needs_changes`; SHOULD be empty otherwise.
